name: LH Financial Group Public Company Limited
summary: LH Financial Group Public Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in banking business in Thailand. The company operates in four segments: Investment Holding Business, Banking Business, Fund Management Business, and Other Businesses. It accepts deposit products, such as demand deposits, savings deposits, time deposits, and fixed deposit receipts; and offers loans, including housing, retail, and commercial loans, as well as overdrafts. The company also provides funds; securities brokerage, trading, and underwriting services; and investment advisory services. LH Financial Group Public Company Limited was founded in 2009 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
